name: dotclaude
description: AI dev infrastructure for Claude Code — a consumable base + a thin generator. Enable the plugin and a project gets a ready-made universal layer used as-is: the operating-discipline skill (how to work), 14 auditor/designer agents (code-review, ux-audit, a11y-audit, pre-flight, data-integrity, product-designer, …), process/knowledge/UI skills, and universal guard hooks. /dotclaude:bootstrap then authors only the un-shareable project layer (identity, architecture, quality-bar, knowledge graph) on top.
